analysis.name: customers_legacy.csv
analysis.dataset_description: This file appears to contain information about customers, likely from a legacy system. It includes customer IDs, full names, country codes, and timestamps for when the records were created.

column_overview.name: country_code
column_overview.notes: The country codes appear to be inconsistent, with some using uppercase (US, DE, CN) and others lowercase (us). This may indicate a data quality issue or a need for standardization.

analysis.summary: The file contains 20 sample rows and appears to be a customer dataset from a legacy system.
recommendations: Standardize the country code format to ensure consistency across records.
confidence_notes: The sample size is relatively small, and further analysis may reveal additional issues or nuances in the data.
